logs.mustBeRunning: Environment must be running to view logs.

noEnvs.title: No environments yet
noEnvs.description: Use the + button next to each group in the sidebar to create one.

rebuildDialog.title: Rebuild environment?
rebuildDialog.description: This will wipe all data and reinstall Odoo from scratch. This action cannot be undone.

clone.title: Clone environment
clone.description: Creates a copy of {{name}} as a new development environment in this project.
clone.branchExists: This branch already exists. Use "same branch as source" or choose a different name.
clone.branchFork: Forked from the source environment's branch.
clone.sameBranch: The cloned environment will use the same branch as the source.
clone.neutralizeDesc: Disables scheduled actions, emails, and external integrations. Recommended for development.

provision.takesMinutes: This may take a few minutes...

settings.deleteDesc: Deleting this environment will permanently destroy all its data and containers. This action cannot be undone.

deleteDialog.title: Delete Environment
deleteDialog.description: Are you sure you want to delete {{name}}? This action cannot be undone.

domain.title: Custom Domain
domain.step1: Enter the subdomain you want to use (e.g. odoo.mycompany.com).
domain.step2: Click "Add domain" — we'll show you the CNAME target to configure.
domain.step3: Go to your DNS provider and add a CNAME record pointing your subdomain to the target shown.
domain.step4: Come back and click "Verify" once the record is saved. DNS changes can take a few minutes to propagate.
domain.dnsRecord: Add this record in your DNS provider
domain.name: Name
domain.domainActive: Your domain is active and pointing correctly to this environment.

provisionDialog.title: New Development Environment
provisionDialog.defaultBranchDesc: Uses the repository's default branch — no new branches created
provisionDialog.neutralizeDesc: Disables scheduled actions, emails, and external integrations. Recommended for development.

workers.title: Workers
workers.description: 1 worker is recommended for development. Use 2+ workers for production loads.

plans.domainLocked: Custom domains are not available on your current plan.
plans.backupsDisabled: Automatic backups are not available on your current plan. Manual backups still work.
plans.devEnvLimitReached: You've reached the development environment limit for your current plan.
plans.workerCannotDecrease: Workers can only be increased, not decreased
